name: hcc-diabetes-mellitus-with-seconday-complication-suspect
description: HCC003v1 - Diabetes Mellitus With Secondary Complication Suspect: surfaces a protocol card recommending an update to the diabetes diagnosis when a patient with uncomplicated diabetes also has a secondary condition commonly associated with diabetes.

protocols.description: Recommends updating an uncomplicated diabetes diagnosis when a secondary complication condition is also present.

meta.title: Diabetes Mellitus With Secondary Complication Suspect
meta.description: All patients with diabetes, uncomplicated AND a 2ndary condition often associated with diabetes.
